texto: Simply give others a bit of yourself a thoughtful act a helpful idea a word of appreciation a lift over a rough spot a sense of understanding a timely suggestion. You take something out of your mind garnished in kindness out of your heart and put it into the other fellow's mind and heart.
explicacao: Citação de Charles H. Burr sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Simply give others a bit of yourself a thoughtful act a helpful idea a word of appreciation a lif…” articula amor, helping, people em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como people.
